name: Code RED WFT/RSC5 Edit Bridge Pass 9 - Menu Fix
purpose: Fix double-click open/close by adding persistent menu, batch launcher, logging, and self-test.
notes: This is a tooling/usability pass only, not a game archive patch.
Same-size decoded RSC5 payload edits remain the safe default.
Requires zstd command-line utility for decompress/recompress.
